task: self-supervised node representation learning on large-scale bipartite graphs
input: large-scale bipartite graph with distinct node features in two domains
backbone: Cascade Bipartite Graph Neural Network (Cascade-BGNN) with Inter-domain Message Passing (IDMP) and Intra-domain Alignment (IDA)
key_idea: cascade training of multi-layer BGNN with inter-domain message passing and intra-domain adversarial alignment for efficient and scalable bipartite graph representation learning
